nodes.label: SVG Icon Sprite (icons.svg)
nodes.description: SVG symbol sprite containing 6 icons used across the Tomorrowland frontend. Icons are referenced by id via <use> elements. Two visual styles are present: solid/filled icons using fill:#08060d (near-black) for social brand icons, and outlined/stroked icons using stroke:#aa3bff (purple) for UI/product icons.

nodes.label: Icon: bluesky-icon
nodes.description: Bluesky social network brand icon. Filled style, fill:#08060d, viewBox 16x17. Butterfly/cloud shape representing the Bluesky platform.

nodes.label: Icon: discord-icon
nodes.description: Discord brand icon. Filled style, fill:#08060d, viewBox 20x19. Controller/game-pad shape representing the Discord platform.

nodes.label: Icon: documentation-icon
nodes.description: Documentation UI icon. Outlined/stroked style, stroke:#aa3bff (purple), viewBox 21x20. Depicts a document/file with code brackets, representing a link to documentation pages.

nodes.label: Icon: github-icon
nodes.description: GitHub brand icon (Octocat silhouette). Filled style, fill:#08060d, viewBox 19x19.

nodes.label: Icon: social-icon
nodes.description: Generic social/community UI icon. Outlined/stroked style, stroke:#aa3bff (purple), viewBox 20x20. Shows a user profile plus a star/badge, likely used for community or social features.

nodes.label: Icon: x-icon
nodes.description: X (formerly Twitter) brand icon. Filled style, fill:#08060d, viewBox 19x19. X logotype shape.

nodes.label: Icon Style: Filled (Brand Social Icons)
nodes.description: Visual style used for brand/social icons (Bluesky, Discord, GitHub, X). Solid filled paths using fill:#08060d (near-black). No stroke.

nodes.label: Icon Style: Outlined (UI Purple Icons)
nodes.description: Visual style used for product/UI icons (documentation, social). Stroked outlines using stroke:#aa3bff (purple), stroke-width:1.35, with round linecap and linejoin. No fill.
